existing.problem: The system still compresses truth differently across bridge packets, family continuity, phase continuity, and runtime boards. This stale problem used to survive across unrelated waves. It points at generic bridge drift instead of the current source open import lane. It can misroute the next worker toward old cleanup instead of live public substrate. It must be replaced when a current bounded question is available.
